zh.Wilton, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓
zh.Mendlesham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可門德萊善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Botetourt於大約1285年出生在英國時，他的父親John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt20歲，母親Maud fitz Thomas17歲。他於1314年與Joan de Somery在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年7月28日在英國英格蘭素福爾可門德萊善姆享年38歲。

zh-hans.Wilton, Herefordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓
zh-hans.Mendlesham, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可門德萊善姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Botetourt于大约1285年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt20岁，母亲Maud fitz Thomas17岁。他于1314年与Joan de Somery在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年7月28日在英国英格兰素福爾可門德萊善姆享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Botetourt was born about 1285, in England, his father, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, was 20 and his mother, Maud fitz Thomas, was 17. He married Joan de Somery in 1314, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 July 1322, in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Botetourt est né environ 1285, à Angleterre, son père, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Maud fitz Thomas, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Somery en 1314, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1322, à Mendlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Botetourt um 1285 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt 20 und seine Mutter Maud fitz Thomas 17. Er hat 1314 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Somery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Juli 1322 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Botetourt è nato il circa 1285 nel England, il suo padre, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Maud fitz Thomas, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Somery nel 1314, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 luglio 1322, nel Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Botetourtが約1285年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourtは20歳，母Maud fitz Thomasは17歳であった。1314年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJoan de Someryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年7月28日にイギリスイギリススフォルクメンドレシャムで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Botetourt(이)가 대략 1285년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud fitz Thomas(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1314년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 7월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멘들레샤에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Botetourt nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Maud fitz Thomas, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Somery em 1314, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1322, em Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Botetourt родился около 1285 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud fitz Thomas, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Somery в 1314 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 июля 1322 г. в местности мендлешам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Botetourt nació aproximadamente 1285, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Maud fitz Thomas, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Joan de Somery en 1314, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de julio de 1322, en Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
